name: com.projectmakers.horizon
description: Official Unity SDK for horizOn, the backend-as-a-service for games. Manager-based API for authentication (anonymous, email, Google, Apple), cloud save, leaderboards, remote config, news, gift codes, feedback, user logs, crash reporting, and email sending. Includes an editor config importer.

samples.description: Per-feature minimal example scripts plus the HelloHorizon end-to-end entry point.
Full guided demo scene and UI Toolkit window covering every SDK feature.
